title: Magical Mermaid Multicolor Cellophane Bags (12cm x 27cm) Pack of 20 - Colorful Party Favor & Treat Bags
features: MAGICAL MERMAID CELLOPHANE BAGS: Dive into a world of enchantment with our whimsical magical mermaid multicolor cellophane bags, perfect for transforming any party into a captivating underwater adventure.

VIBRANT MULTICOLOR DESIGN: Showcasing an alluring blend of colors reminiscent of a mermaid's tail, these treat bags effortlessly capture the magical essence of the deep sea, adding a splash of charm to your event.

IDEAL SIZE: Spacious enough to hold a variety of goodies and treats, these 12cm x 27cm party favor bags make it a breeze to send your guests home with a delightful, keepsake of your under-the-sea celebration.
PACK OF 20: Stock up on these enchanting cellophane bags with our convenient pack of 20, ensuring you have enough magical mermaid bags to accommodate all of your party attendees.

COLORFUL PARTY FAVOR & TREAT BAGS: These eye-catching multicolor bags, ideal for birthday parties, themed events, or summer get-togethers, elevate your party décor while providing guests with a fun way to transport their treasures home.
description: From the manufacturer Pretty Purple Caribbean Teal Hot Pink Mermaid Birthday Add-On Items Dive into your Birthday celebrations and make a splash with your guests with these beautiful designs! A great selection of tableware, accessories and decorations will let you celebrate the joyous occasion in style! Mix and match with our solid colour items to create the perfect party look! We Have Everything Covered! Paper Plates, Napkins, Paper Cups, Decorations & Accessories... More Coordinating Ranges Available! If Mermaid Birthday isn't your taste, check out our other beautiful Birthday options. Are you having helium balloons? Don’t forget the curling ribbon and weights!
